overview.text: Fire and Rescue NSW (FRNSW) is the primary fire and emergency service for urban areas in New South Wales, responsible for protecting life, property and the environment in cities, larger towns and key industrial areas.

items: Operates approximately 335 fire stations across NSW.
Responds to more than 130,000 incidents each year.
